ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID AS AWARD_DETAILS, A.YEAR AS AWARD_YEAR, A.LEAGUE_ID AS AWARD_LEAGUE, V.AWARD_ID AS VOTE_AWARD, V.YEAR AS VOTE_YEAR, V.POINTS_WON, V.POINTS_MAX, V.VOTES_FIRST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P LEFT JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID LEFT JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID

interactions.utterance: What is the birth year of the players you just mentioned?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the birth year of the players who were mentioned previously.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, BIRTH_YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me their weight?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the weight of the players mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, WEIGHT FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players have won awards along with their respective salaries?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the players who have won awards and their associated salaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, S.SALARY, AW.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AW ON P.PLAYER_ID = AW.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON AW.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND AW.YEAR = S.YEAR AND AW.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are their birth years and weights?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the birth years and weights of the players from the previous question.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.BIRTH_YEAR, P.WEIGHT FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P WHERE P.PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT AW.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AW JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON AW.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND AW.YEAR = S.YEAR AND AW.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID);

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who is the heaviest player among them?
interactions.intention: Identify the heaviest player among the players retrieved earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.WEIGHT FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P WHERE P.PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT AW.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AW JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON AW.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND AW.YEAR = S.YEAR AND AW.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID) ORDER BY P.WEIGHT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: How many players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the average number of votes received by players inducted in 1936?
interactions.intention: What was the average number of votes received by players inducted in 1936?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(VOTES) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which player inducted in 1936 also received awards and what were their salaries?
interactions.intention: Which player inducted in 1936 also received awards and what were their salaries?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, SALARY.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AWARD ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = AWARD.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SALARY ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = SALARY.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.YEARID = 1936 AND HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players inducted into the Hall of Fame have also received player awards?
interactions.intention: Find players inducted into the Hall of Fame who have also received player awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT HOF.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those players, how many total votes did they receive during their Hall of Fame induction?
interactions.intention: Find the total votes received during the Hall of Fame induction for players who were inducted and received awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, SUM(HOF.VOTES) AS TOTAL_VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y' GROUP BY HOF.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What categories were these players inducted under?
interactions.intention: Find the categories under which the players who were inducted and received awards got inducted.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT HOF.CATEGORY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'
